creator: mkb@altair.mayn.de
text:
Unlike advertised, the open-motif-devel port doesn't install header
files required for developing (and compiling) Motif programs.
In fact, the distfiles archive file, openmotif-2.1.30-1_MLI.tgz,
doesn't contain any include files, only the compiled object archive
libraries.  Maybe this is just a temporary deficiency, I don't know.

Fix: 

trivial aswell (for the ports maintainer).
How-To-Repeat: 
trivial.
